item.title: Royal Navy preparing support ship to deploy to eastern Mediterranean
item.description: RFA Lyme Bay is placed on "heightened readiness" as a precaution, the Ministry of Defence says.

item.title: Joey Barton arrested after assault near golf club
item.description: The former footballer was arrested along with a second suspect near Huyton and Prescot Golf Club.

item.title: Glasgow Central Station remains closed in aftermath of fire
item.description: Scotland's busiest station remains closed following a huge fire that destroyed a neighbouring building.

item.title: Family of child injured in Canada school shooting sues OpenAI
item.description: The family alleges the firm knew the perpetrator was planning a "mass casualty event" but failed to contact the authorities.

item.title: Inmate charged with murder of Soham killer Ian Huntley
item.description: A prison inmate has been charged with the murder of Soham killer Ian Huntley, police say.
